text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Your running is incredible, Hot Rod!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for giving us such a fun race! Come to
Fukushima again sometime!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for your support! The scenery around the
track is gorgeous! I'll definitely be back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky has a great race during summer
camp.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wow, it's already getting dark...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'd have loved to spend the night there, but we
had to get back to camp.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I enjoyed the race so much, though! Summer
training has really paid off!
choice_data_list: It was a great race! No notes!
It was a great race! No notes!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks. I wonder if everyone else had a
great time too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Welcome back! Wait, I mean, when did you go to
Fukushima?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When I saw you on the live broadcast, I thought
you must have a twin!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! I'm glad I caught you by surprise!
Although, I'm pretty sure my name was on the
racer list...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, guess I missed it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Really though, I was glued to the screen! When
you crossed the finish line, everyone was so
excited!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was so motivated by watching it that I even did
some training right afterwards!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wow, really?!
choice_data_list: Sounds like you're still inspiring people.
Sounds like you're still inspiring people.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That makes the hard work all worth it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um, by the way, I arranged a celebration party
for you with Grass and the others!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We want to hear all about the race from you and
your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're the best! Of course I'd love to be a part of
it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the mid-camp race ends up being both a
great result for us and a powerful motivation for
others.
